svg.text: Isagawa QA Platform · Python/Selenium 4-layer POM · Self-improving Kernel
L002: inline-style XPath for JS apps
L003: no cd subdir in Bash hooks
L007: f-string XPath breaks on apostrophe
Orchestrates MULTIPLE tasks · returns None · no Page imports
@autologger("Task") · one domain operation per method · returns None
Compose Pages only · NO Role imports · NO locators
No @autologger · locators as class constants · atomic methods return self
state-check: is_*() has_*() get_*() · compose BrowserInterface (no inherit)
Locator strategy: inline-style XPath for JS apps · data-testid preferred
Selenium WebDriver wrapper · DO NOT MODIFY
Explicit waits only · StaleElement + AttributeError in ignored_exceptions
Locators in Task layer — Task calls POM methods only
Page imports in Role layer — Roles compose Tasks only
from framework.X import Y inside framework/ (L005)
cd subdir && command in Bash hooks (L003)
Class-based selectors on JS apps — inline-style XPath (L002)
Production mode: tests/, pages/, tasks/, roles/ only
3 tests: page loads, project filter, expand
